category_sources: source_facts.description says "GNU compiler collection for x86_64-elf"; official GCC documentation identifies GCC as the GNU Compiler Collection.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is x86_64-elf-gcc; current_curation.display-name is x86_64-elf-gcc.
docs_sources: Official GCC online documentation provides the manual set; source_facts.homepage is the official GCC project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GCC Git access page gives https://gcc.gnu.org/git/gcc.git as the public read-only source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GCC packaged for the x86_64-elf cross-compilation target.
